hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=j.tool_input?.command||'';const blocked=[/rm\\s+-rf\\s+\\//,/git\\s+push\\s+.*--force.*main/,/git\\s+push\\s+.*--force.*master/,/npm\\s+install/,/npm\\s+i\\s/,/yarn\\s+add/,/yarn\\s+install/];if(blocked.some(r=>r.test(cmd))){console.error('BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected: '+cmd);process.exit(1)}})" 2>&1 || exit 1

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(f&&/\\.env(\\.local|\\.development\\.local|\\.test\\.local|\\.production\\.local)?$/.test(f)&&!/\\.env\\.example$/.test(f)){console.error('BLOCKED: Cannot write to .env files with secrets: '+f);process.exit(1)}})" 2>&1 || exit 1
